CustomField.formula:
CASE( leaseworks__Requirement_Type__c, "TextArea", leaseworks__Text_Reinsurance__c,
"Percentage", IF( ISNULL(leaseworks__Percentage_Reinsurance__c), '', TEXT(leaseworks__Percentage_Reinsurance__c * 100) + '%' ),
"Currency", IF( ISNULL(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c), '', '$' + IF( leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c >= 1000000000000000, TEXT(FLOOR(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c / 1000000000000000)) & "," & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1000000000000000) / 1000000000000)), 3) & "," & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1000000000000) / 1000000000)), 3) & "," & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1000000000) / 1000000)), 3) & "," & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1000000) / 1000)), 3) & ",", IF( leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c >= 1000000000000, TEXT(FLOOR(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c / 1000000000000)) & "," & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1000000000000) / 1000000000)), 3) & "," & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1000000000) / 1000000)), 3) & "," & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1000000) / 1000)), 3) & ",", IF( leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c >= 1000000000, TEXT(FLOOR(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c / 1000000000)) & "," & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1000000000) / 1000000)), 3) & "," & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1000000) / 1000)), 3) & ",", IF( leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c >= 1000000, TEXT(FLOOR(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c / 1000000)) & "," & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1000000) / 1000)), 3) & ",", IF( leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c >= 1000, TEXT(FLOOR(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c / 1000)) & ",", "" ) ) ) ) ) & RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c)), 3) & "." & IF( MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1) * 100 < 10, "0" & TEXT(ROUND(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1), 2) * 100), TEXT(MIN(ROUND(MOD(leaseworks__Amount_Reinsurance__c, 1), 2) * 100, 99)) ) ),
"Date", TEXT(leaseworks__Date_Reinsurance__c),
"Number", TEXT(leaseworks__Number_Reinsurance__c),
"Checkbox", IF( leaseworks__Selection_Reinsurance__c, "Yes", IF(CreatedDate == LastModifiedDate, "", "No") ),
"" )
CustomField.label: Reinsurance Cert Requirements
